description.en: The Department of Statistics Singapore (DOS) is the national statistical authority providing official statistics on population, economy, trade, digital economy, and social indicators.
description.zh: 新加坡统计局是新加坡国家统计机构，提供人口、经济、贸易、数字经济和社会指标的官方统计数据。

en: GDP and Economic Performance - Quarterly national accounts and growth forecasts
Population and Demographics - Resident population, age structure, and labor force
Trade Statistics - Merchandise and services trade by partner and commodity
Digital Economy - ICT sector performance and digital adoption metrics
zh: GDP和经济表现 - 季度国民账户和增长预测
人口和人口统计 - 常住人口、年龄结构和劳动力
贸易统计 - 按伙伴和商品分类的货物和服务贸易
数字经济 - ICT部门表现和数字化采用指标
